name: TextureSpace
summary: Texture space When a mapping primitive is a box or a capped cylinder, there are two options for the mapping. Either the sides all map to (0,1)x(0,1) (so the either texture map appears on each side, or the sides map to distinct regions of the texture space.

enum_values.name: Single
enum_values.summary: sides and caps map to same texture space

enum_values.name: Divided
enum_values.summary: regions of texture space. (0, 1/4, 2/4, 3/4, 1) for uncapped boxes. (0, 1/6, 2/6, 3/6, 4/6, 5/6, 1) for capped boxes. (0, 4/6, 5/6, 1) for capped cylinders.
